title: How do I bulk create columns for a board?
excerpt: Is there a way to bulk create new columns on a board? In one of my boards, I need to have a column for each week of the year for 4 years… which means creating 4 x 52 weeks worth of columns. Is there a way to bulk create …

posts.author: Annaliserose (Annalise Knight)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to bulk create new columns on a board? In one of my boards, I need to have a column for each week of the year for 4 years… which means creating 4 x 52 weeks worth of columns. Is there a way to bulk create these columns or do I need to create them manually (one by one)?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Annaliserose - directly in monday there is no way to do it. However you could script a simple make.com scenario that would create the 208 columns in a few seconds. It’s a one time shot so manually doing it may just be the path of least resistance.

Thanks,
Mark
